movieBenefit.description: Buy one movie ticket via BookMyShow, get the second ticket free

history.oldValue: Complimentary domestic and international airport lounge access included
history.newValue: Complimentary airport lounge access discontinued; replaced with complimentary Priority Pass membership (600+ airport lounges)

faqTemplateAnswers.Is this card lifetime free?: No. It carries a one-time joining fee of around ₹9,999 (sometimes waived depending on the application channel/offer), but there is no separate annual/renewal fee thereafter.
faqTemplateAnswers.Is it worth it?: It can be worth it for frequent international travellers who value the low 1.8% forex markup and concierge services, but the discontinuation of complimentary airport lounge access since March 2025 has reduced its value versus other premium travel cards, which now only offer a Priority Pass membership in its place.
faqTemplateAnswers.Who should get this card?: Frequent international travellers who want a low forex markup, concierge services, and BOGO movie tickets, and who are comfortable paying a one-time joining fee.
faqTemplateAnswers.Does it support UPI?: No. The Legend card is issued on the Visa Signature network and does not support UPI linking; IndusInd offers separate RuPay cards elsewhere in its portfolio for UPI use.
faqTemplateAnswers.Can I get lounge access with this card?: Complimentary airport lounge access was discontinued from 7 March 2025. The card now offers a complimentary Priority Pass membership instead; confirm current per-visit terms with IndusInd Bank before relying on this benefit.
faqTemplateAnswers.What income is required to qualify?: Not clearly published; as a premium card it typically targets higher-income salaried or self-employed applicants — confirm current eligibility with IndusInd Bank.
faqTemplateAnswers.Who should avoid this card?: Travellers who specifically want guaranteed free airport lounge access, or anyone unwilling to pay the upfront joining fee for a card with no other ongoing annual fee.
faqTemplateAnswers.What are the best alternatives?: Axis Bank Magnus, HDFC Diners Club Black, or SBI Card Elite for cardholders who want guaranteed complimentary lounge access.
